---
title: "ChemistryLab.jl"
description: >
  A Julia package providing computational tools for chemistry and materials science.
  Now hosted on Codeberg and registered in MPCM-Registry.
categories: [Julia, Chemistry, Materials Science]
image: "../images/logo_chemistrylab.png"
---

![](../images/logo_chemistrylab.png){.jfb-page-logo}

**ChemistryLab.jl** is a Julia package for computational chemistry and materials science,
featuring Gibbs-energy minimization, phase equilibria, and reaction kinetics.
Part of the **[MicroPoroChemoMechanics](../software/mpcm.qmd)** ecosystem.

### Installation

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.Registry.add(RegistrySpec(url="https://codeberg.org/MicroPoroChemoMechanics/MPCM-Registry"))
Pkg.add("ChemistryLab")
```

### Key features

- Gibbs energy minimization using interior-point solver (OptimaSolver.jl backend)
- Phase equilibrium computations with multiple constraints
- Chemical kinetics and reaction rate laws
- Full ForwardDiff compatibility for sensitivity analysis

### Links

[![Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/docs-stable-blue?logo=julia)](https://MicroPoroChemoMechanics.codeberg.page/ChemistryLab.jl/)
[![Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/Codeberg-ChemistryLab.jl-181717?logo=codeberg)](https://codeberg.org/MicroPoroChemoMechanics/ChemistryLab.jl)
